name: Liven
one_liner: Earn cashback automatically at 1,000+ Australian restaurants just by paying in-app.
benefit: Earn 5–20% LivenCash back at participating restaurants; cashback is applied automatically when you pay via the Liven app — no vouchers to activate; redeem LivenCash at any Liven partner venue.
signup_bonus: ~$5–10 LivenCash for new members who sign up via a referral (check current terms)
referral_note: Get a referral via OzBargain's referral threads/randomiser so both you and the referrer get the bonus.

how_to_join.action: Get a referral code from OzBargain's Liven referral thread
Download the Liven app (iOS or Android) and create an account using the referral code
Add a payment method and browse nearby Liven partner restaurants
Pay via the Liven app at a participating restaurant to earn cashback automatically

risks: Partner restaurant coverage is strongest in major cities (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth)
LivenCash can only be redeemed at Liven partner venues
Referral bonus terms vary — check at time of signup
est_value: ~$5–10 signup bonus + 5–20% cashback on dining out at partner venues
